description: 两层测试:unit(19 file, ~180 test case, 无外部依赖)+ e2e(4 file, ~12 test case, 标记 @pytest.mark.e2e;部分要求飞书真 API/真 CS 实例)。pytest.ini 设 testpaths=tests, pythonpath=src, asyncio_mode=auto, markers=e2e/prerelease。conftest.py 强制 sys.path.insert(0, src) 以免根目录旧 plugins 污染。单元测试普遍用 AsyncMock / MagicMock stub 飞书/IRC/WS。

key_classes_functions.name: conftest sys.path 注入
key_classes_functions.purpose: 确保 src/ 在 sys.path 首位,plugins 导入指向 src/plugins/(非根 plugins/)。

key_classes_functions.name: TestEncodeUsesProtocol/TestRunZchatCli/TestJoinChannel/TestSysMessageInjection
key_classes_functions.purpose: agent_mcp 覆盖:encode_*/subprocess stub/list_tools 包含 run_zchat_cli/join_channel 调用/sys event 注入注入 notifications/claude/channel。

key_classes_functions.name: Router 单元测试组
key_classes_functions.purpose: 20+ test 全覆盖:default mode/copilot @ 前缀/takeover 不 @/命令 → plugin 不去 IRC/未知命令去 IRC/IRC inbound broadcast/strip #/msg 前缀解析/plugin broadcast/event 三路广播/entry offline 熔断/NAMES 熔断 fail-open/已编码不双编码/IRC inbound 命令分派。

key_classes_functions.name: SLA 双 timer 测试
key_classes_functions.purpose: __side 首个 @operator/@admin trigger/agent quote marker 不 trigger(首个 @ 不匹配)/human relay side 取消 timer/独立 timer per channel/help timeout emit help_timeout。

key_classes_functions.name: routing_reader 监管测试
key_classes_functions.purpose: supervises:multiple bots / single bot / 排除 own / 'bot:' prefix / 'tag:' V7 跳过 warn。 test_no_import_of_channel_server(line 92) 断言 bridge reader 不依赖 CS。

key_classes_functions.name: E2E pipeline
key_classes_functions.purpose: test_full_lifecycle 覆盖 mode→takeover→resolve→csat→audit 聚合。

key_classes_functions.name: E2E help_request_lifecycle
key_classes_functions.purpose: operator 及时响应/无响应 timeout/help+takeover timer 独立。

key_classes_functions.name: E2E bridge lazy_create
key_classes_functions.purpose: bot_added 懒创建调 zchat CLI(channel create + agent create)+ channel_id 从 chat_id 生成 + 已映射跳过 + disbanded 清理。

public_interface: pytest 入口:uv run pytest tests/unit/ -v 或 tests/e2e/ -v -m e2e
depends_on: 被测模块: channel_server.* / plugins.* / feishu_bridge.* / agent_mcp
